risk_title: Government Account Freezes Disrupting Local Development Planning and Execution
risk_summary: Freezing of local government accounts in 2022 continues to cascade delays in annual investment plan (PAI) elaboration and FNDL fund execution cycles, affecting project implementation timelines and local service delivery.
evidence_quote: le gel des comptes des communes en 2022, qui continue d'impacter le calendrier de planification et d'exécution des Plans Annuels d'Investissement (PAI)

risk_title: Government Dissolution Creating Bureaucratic Delays in Fund Transfers
risk_summary: Dissolution of government in February 2024 caused bureaucratic delays affecting FNDL fund replenishment and project implementation, with cascading effects on local investment execution.
evidence_quote: la dissolution du gouvernement en février 2024, qui a entraîné des retards bureaucratiques affectant le réapprovisionnement du FNDL

risk_title: Municipal Council Dissolution Disrupting Local Governance Structures
risk_summary: Dissolution of municipal councils in March 2024 has disrupted local governance structures and decision-making processes, requiring reconstitution of community engagement committees and affecting project implementation.
evidence_quote: la dissolution des conseils municipaux en mars 2024

risk_title: Suspension of Local Public Service Reform Affecting Institutional Capacity
risk_summary: Suspension of local public service reform initiated in 2023, including recruitment of Local Development Planning Service Chiefs (CSPDL), has created institutional gaps and required temporary workarounds that may not be sustainable.
evidence_quote: la suspension d'une réforme des services publics locaux initiée en 2023

risk_title: Suspension of CSPDL Recruitment Requiring Temporary Staffing Solutions
risk_summary: Recruitment of Chief Local Development Planning Officers (CSPDL) suspended since April 2024, forcing ANAFIC to implement temporary solution with 362 Community Technical Agents (ATEC) and 9,939 Community Animators, which may not provide adequate institutional sustainability.
evidence_quote: Le recrutement des Chef de Service de Planification du Développement Local (CSPDL), prévu dans le cadre de la réforme de la fonction publique locale, est suspendu depuis avril 2024

risk_title: Conflict Risk Management System Operational in Limited Geographic Coverage
risk_summary: Early Warning and Response System (SAPR) operational in only 169 of 337 communes, leaving significant geographic gaps in conflict prevention and response capacity despite 3,969 alerts identified and treated.
evidence_quote: A date le SAPR est opérationnel dans 169 CL

risk_title: Delayed Deployment of Municipal Treasurers Affecting Financial Governance
risk_summary: Nomination of 120 municipal treasurers (receveurs municipaux) delayed from August 2024 to December 2024, with only 13 appointed in Conakry without full credentials, undermining local financial management capacity and project implementation.
evidence_quote: Seuls 13 receveurs municipaux sont nommés mais sans caution et sans prestation de serment...Un retard certain est constaté

risk_title: Institutional Governance Gaps in Digitalization Project Management
risk_summary: Strategic Orientation Committee (COS), Steering Committee (CODIR), and project team for financial digitalization not yet installed as of October 2024, creating governance vacuum that previously contributed to SIM_BA implementation failure in PAGL 1.
evidence_quote: des arrêtés ministériels, en préparation, sont nécessaires pour la constitution du COS et du CODIR...Un retard est donc constaté

risk_title: Asset Security Breaches at Project Level
risk_summary: Theft of laptop computers at national project office indicates asset security vulnerabilities and potential governance weaknesses in project management.
evidence_quote: des vols d'ordinateurs portables au niveau du bureau national
